plist.dict:
CFBundleIdentifier com.alinrj.claude-notify CFBundleName ClaudeNotifier CFBundleDisplayName Claude Notifier CFBundleExecutable claude-notifier CFBundleIconFile AppIcon CFBundlePackageType APPLno CFBundleVersion 1.0.0 CFBundleShortVersionString 1.0.0 LSMinimumSystemVersion 13.0 LSUIElement
NSUserNotificationAlertStyle banner
